NTC OF RELATED CASE FILED BY DEFENDANT UNIFIED MARINE INC. DBA SEASENSE

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT UNIFIED MARINE INC. DBA SEASENSE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519280 WITH CASE CGC-12-519279 FOR ALL PURPOSES IS DENIED. COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION IS PROPER ONLY WHEN "THE PARTIES ARE IDENTICAL AND THE CAUSES COULD HAVE BEEN JOINED." SANCHEZ V. SUERIOR. COURT (1988) 203 CAL APP. 3D 1391,1396. HERE, THE PARTIES ARE NOT IDENTICAL AND MOVING PARTY DID NOT REQUEST A MORE LIMITED FORM OF CONSOLIDATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DBA SEASENSE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, or alternatively, for summary adjudication is off calendar per the dismissal filed on June 13, 2013. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Plaintiff As You Sow'S Motion In Support Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S As You Sow'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Request For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Set No. One And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ellison Folk, Esq. of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger, Tel. 415.552.7272, for plaintiff and moving party;
Kelly Savage Day, Esq. of Sedgwick, Tel. 415.781.7900, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on Plaintiff As You Sow's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Request For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Set No. 1 And For Sanctions. The motion is granted in part and denied in part. Special Interrogatory No. 34/Request for Production No. 16 - Granted to the extent documents have not already been produced. With regard to the remaining documents: Defendant shall, within 10 court days, produce relevant documents related to the sale or marketing of liquid electrical tape by LH French and any other on-line retailer which are in its custody or control. Request for Production No. 20 - Denied. Defendant has already produced all responsive documents. No sanctions are awarded to either party. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519280 WITH CASE CGC-12-519279
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter R. Miljanich, Esq. of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, Tel. 415.552.7272, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT UNIFIED MARINE INC. DBA SEASENSE's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519280 WITH CASE CGC-12-519279 for all purposes is denied. Complete consolidation is proper only when "the parties are identical and the causes could have been joined." Sanchez v. Suerior. Court (1988) 203 Cal App. 3d 1391,1396. Here, the parties are not identical and moving party did not request a more limited form of consolidation. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
